title: parasenecio hastatus var. hastatus
intro: Parasenecio hastatus var. hastatus, also known as the lesser ragwort or lesser hawk's beard, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Parasenecio hastatus var. hastatus is often used as a tincture, infusion, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
